dialogues.speaker: Lodge Medic
lines: Cold drains a party faster than a long fight.
Warm up here. Your JoyMon are healed.

dialogues.speaker: Lodge Medic
lines: The mountain winds are calmer since the shrine cleared.
Rest up here. Your JoyMon are fully healed.

dialogues.speaker: Lodge Keeper
lines: The shrine path stays sealed until you have proven yourself against two Frostveil trainers.

dialogues.speaker: Lodge Keeper
lines: Mina, Orro, and Pela all know the path. Two of them have vouched for you.
The shrine entrance is open. Step carefully.

dialogues.speaker: Lodge Keeper
lines: You calmed the guardian of Snowbell Shrine!
The Frostveil region owes you its peace, young traveler.

dialogues.speaker: Ridge Scout
lines: Snobble hold the path when storms blow in.
Chilleaf stay near green breaks in the snow.

dialogues.speaker: Ridge Scout
lines: The shortcut at the top of the mountain has opened.
No more freezing puzzles just to get through the shrine!

dialogues.speaker: Snowbound Guest
lines: I saw Staticrow sparking through the snowfall.
Even familiar JoyMon behave differently this high up.

dialogues.speaker: Snowbound Guest
lines: I can hear a gentle melody from the shrine now.
The wild JoyMon seem much calmer since the boss was defeated.
